title: SpaceX 已向 SEC 递交保密 IPO 申请，承销商名单曝光
summary: 知情人士透露，SpaceX 于 4 月 1 日正式提交保密 IPO 申请，高盛与摩根士丹利担任联席主承销商，目标估值区间 $3500 亿–$4000 亿美元，S-1 最快 5 月初公开。

title: World model maker Odyssey nabs $1.45B valuation backed by Amazon and other big names
summary: World models are the next big thing in AI beyond LLMs and, with this round, Odyssey has cemented itself as one of the startups to watch.

title: SpaceX alum nabs $22M to turn rocket engines into geothermal power plants
summary: Critical Energy is turning rocket engines into geothermal power plants, and it wants to build 300 GW per year by 2045.

title: Inveniam to acquire Mantra after turbulent year marked by OM crash
summary: Inveniam announced plans to acquire Mantra, a blockchain project that spent the past year recovering from the collapse of its OM token and prolonged market pressure.

title: Uniswap Jumps Double Digits as Standard Chartered Eyes $100 UNI by 2030
summary: The DeFi token is up 20% in a day, with a Standard Chartered note and Uniswap's tokenized-stock launch fueling fresh demand.

title: Anthropic’s latest feud with the Trump admin may actually help it, sales data suggests
summary: Anthropic's popularity with business users is growing so well that the latest beef with the government might actually boost it, data from Ramp suggests.

title: SpaceX valuation balloons to $2.6T, briefly passes Amazon
summary: SpaceX's valuation has increased by $1 trillion since its shares started trading on Friday.

title: ChatGPT Is Still Huge, But Rival AI Chatbots Are Catching Up Fast
summary: Sensor Tower's State of AI 2026 report shows ChatGPT's audience share slipping below 50% for the first time, as Gemini's default-app advantage and Claude's Pentagon-fueled rally eat into OpenAI's lead.

title: Coinbase Gears Up to Launch Tokenized Stock Trading, Crypto and Equities Options
summary: Publicly traded crypto exchange Coinbase added to its feature set Tuesday as it seeks to become the "everything exchange."

title: SpaceX Shares Hit New High as Elon Musk's Firm Agrees to Acquire AI Startup Cursor for $60 Billion
summary: The all-stock deal would make Cursor a wholly owned SpaceX subsidiary and deepen the company's push into AI following its blockbuster IPO.
